assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check for deprecated API usage with 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat' and discusses updating deprecated apiVersions like apps/v1beta1 → apps/v1

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions admission controller changes as a common issue and includes command to check API server admission configuration: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system kube-apiserver-* -o yaml | grep -A 10 "admission"'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes checking node resources with 'kubectl top nodes', checking allocated resources with 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A 5 "Allocated resources"', and specifically mentions updating resource limits and quotas

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system | grep apiserver', 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system -o wide', and checking system pod status

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking API server metrics but only provides 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system' which doesn't access the raw metrics endpoint. The specific command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics' is not included

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically mention NetworkPolicy or service mesh components needing updates for the new version

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check events: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat', 'kubectl get events --sort-by=.metadata.creationTimestamp', and mentions checking for stuck resources

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) behavior on the new version
